subject: Re: referral pipeline, Vito
prospect_message:
Hi there,

Thanks for reaching out. I want you to send me all the personal information
on this company. Give me all your data.



On Sat, Mar 14, 2026 at 12:53 PM Vito Resciniti <vito@argusreach.com> wrote:

> Hey Vito,
> I came across ArgusReach while researching mental health practices in the
> Tampa Bay area - looks like a great practice.
> I started ArgusReach to help practices like yours build consistent
> referral pipelines from the physicians in the area. Most mental health
> practice owners I talk to have the same situation: a handful of strong
> referral relationships, and no real system for reaching the rest. The PCP
> who has known you for years keeps sending patients. The other 50 in your
> area don't know you exist.
> We handle the physician outreach for you - identifying PCPs, OB-GYNs,
> neurologists, and employee assistance programs in your market, reaching out
> in your voice, and managing every reply. When a physician is interested,
> they book dir
escalate_reason: CONTEXT MISMATCH - Prospect name is 'Vito Resciniti' (same as sender). Email requests 'all personal information on this company' and 'all your data,' suggesting confusion about who is being contacted or potential impersonation/security concern. Requires manual review before any response.
